verses.text: Paul, an apostle 'not of men... but by Jesus Christ,' greets them; Christ 'gave himself for our sins.' Divine calling. His office and gospel are from God, not man.
Paul, an apostle 'not of men... but by Jesus Christ,' greets them; Christ 'gave himself for our sins.' Divine calling. His office and gospel are from God, not man.
Paul, an apostle 'not of men... but by Jesus Christ,' greets them; Christ 'gave himself for our sins.' Divine calling. His office and gospel are from God, not man.
Paul, an apostle 'not of men... but by Jesus Christ,' greets them; Christ 'gave himself for our sins.' Divine calling. His office and gospel are from God, not man.
Paul, an apostle 'not of men... but by Jesus Christ,' greets them; Christ 'gave himself for our sins.' Divine calling. His office and gospel are from God, not man.
I marvel ye are 'so soon removed' to another gospel, 'which is not another,' but a perversion. Quick falling. They were turning from grace to a false way.
I marvel ye are 'so soon removed' to another gospel, 'which is not another,' but a perversion. Quick falling. They were turning from grace to a false way.
'Though we, or an angel from heaven, preach any other gospel... let him be accursed.' One gospel. No messenger may alter the truth of grace.
'Though we, or an angel from heaven, preach any other gospel... let him be accursed.' One gospel. No messenger may alter the truth of grace.
I please not men; the gospel I preach is 'by the revelation of Jesus Christ.' Not man's word. His message came straight from Christ.
I please not men; the gospel I preach is 'by the revelation of Jesus Christ.' Not man's word. His message came straight from Christ.
I please not men; the gospel I preach is 'by the revelation of Jesus Christ.' Not man's word. His message came straight from Christ.
I once persecuted the church, but God called me by His grace 'to reveal his Son in me.' Changed by grace. The persecutor was made an apostle.
I once persecuted the church, but God called me by His grace 'to reveal his Son in me.' Changed by grace. The persecutor was made an apostle.
I once persecuted the church, but God called me by His grace 'to reveal his Son in me.' Changed by grace. The persecutor was made an apostle.
I once persecuted the church, but God called me by His grace 'to reveal his Son in me.' Changed by grace. The persecutor was made an apostle.
I went not at once to the apostles, but to Arabia; later I saw Peter and James. Independent. His gospel owed nothing to the other apostles.

I went not at once to the apostles, but to Arabia; later I saw Peter and James. Independent. His gospel owed nothing to the other apostles.
Unknown by face in Judaea, the churches 'glorified God in me.' God praised. His conversion turned others to praise.
